panels.description: Request volume per replica/pod over time
panels.title: Request Rate per Replica

panels.description: Error rate percentage per replica over time
panels.title: Error Rate per Replica

panels.description: End-to-end request latency P95 per replica
panels.title: E2E Latency P95 per Replica

panels.description: Time to First Token P95 per replica
panels.title: TTFT P95 per Replica

panels.description: Time per Output Token P95 per replica
panels.title: TPOT P95 per Replica

panels.description: Number of requests waiting in queue per replica
panels.title: Requests Waiting per Replica

panels.description: Number of requests currently being processed per replica
panels.title: Requests Running per Replica

panels.description: KV cache utilization percentage per replica
panels.title: KV Cache Utilization per Replica

panels.description: Input tokens processed per second per replica
panels.title: Input Token Throughput per Replica

panels.description: Output tokens generated per second per replica
panels.title: Output Token Throughput per Replica

panels.description: Queue time P95 per replica - time requests spent waiting before processing
panels.title: Queue Time P95 per Replica

panels.description: Average number of tokens per request over time per replica
panels.title: Average Tokens per Request per Replica

panels.description: Time spent in the prefill phase (P95) per replica. Identifies pods with slow prefill processing.
panels.title: Prefill Time P95 per Replica

panels.description: Time spent in the decode phase (P95) per replica. Identifies pods with slow token generation.
panels.title: Decode Time P95 per Replica

panels.description: Prefix cache hit rate per replica. Low hit rate on specific pods may indicate uneven routing or cache cold-start.
panels.title: Prefix Cache Hit Rate per Replica

panels.description: Rate of request preemptions per replica. Preemptions indicate KV cache memory pressure on specific pods.
panels.title: Preemptions per Replica

panels.description: Average tokens per engine iteration per replica. Shows batch size consistency across pods.
panels.title: Avg Tokens per Iteration per Replica
KV Transfer, Token Sources & Inter-Token Latency

panels.description: KV cache offload throughput in bytes/s per replica. Only populated when KV cache offloading to CPU is active.
panels.title: KV Offload Throughput per Replica

panels.description: KV cache offload time per replica. Only populated when KV cache offloading to CPU is active.
panels.title: KV Offload Time per Replica

panels.description: Inter-token latency P99 per replica. Measures the time between consecutive output tokens. High values indicate decode-phase stalls on specific pods.
panels.title: Inter-Token Latency P99 per Replica

panels.description: Prompt token rate per replica broken down by source: local_compute (computed from scratch), local_cache_hit (prefix cache), external_kv_transfer (P/D KV transfer).
panels.title: Prompt Tokens by Source per Replica

panels.description: Distribution of KV tokens computed during prefill per replica. High values indicate prefill is computing KV from scratch rather than reusing cached or transferred KV.
panels.title: Prefill KV Computed Tokens per Replica

panels.description: P95 NIXL KV cache transfer duration per replica. Measures time to complete the RDMA/network transfer of KV cache blocks between disaggregated prefill and decode instances.
panels.title: NIXL Transfer Time P95 per Replica

panels.description: P95 NIXL transfer post time per replica. Measures the overhead of posting/initiating NIXL transfers (descriptor setup, notification).
panels.title: NIXL Post Time P95 per Replica

panels.description: P95 bytes transferred per NIXL KV cache transfer per replica. Large transfers indicate big prompt KV blocks being moved between P and D instances.
panels.title: NIXL Bytes per Transfer P95 per Replica

panels.description: Rate of failed NIXL transfers and notifications per replica. Any non-zero value indicates RDMA/network issues between P and D instances.
panels.title: NIXL Failed Transfers & Notifications per Replica

panels.description: Rate of requests whose KV cache expired before the decode instance could consume it. Tracked on the prefill instance. Non-zero values indicate the decode side is too slow to pick up KV blocks.
panels.title: NIXL KV Expired Requests per Replica

panels.description: Engine sleep state per replica: awake=1 means engine is active, weights_offloaded=1 means sleep level 1 (weights moved to CPU), discard_all=1 means sleep level 2 (all state discarded). Sleeping engines save GPU memory but have cold-start latency on wakeup.
panels.title: Engine Sleep State per Replica

title: AI / Model Serving / LLMs / Replica Detail View
